parameterdescription.para: Pointer to LSS unique 128-bit identity address.

briefdescription.para: Process an incoming CAN frame for LSS Slave processing.

parameterdescription.para: Output CAN frame buffer (populated with 0x7E4 response if required).

simplesect.para: True if a response frame should be transmitted over CAN.

briefdescription.para: Build an LSS Master request frame to switch global mode.
Build an LSS Master request frame to configure Node-ID.
Build an LSS Master request frame to configure Bit Timing / Baud rate.
Build an LSS Master request frame to store configuration to NVM.
CANopen CiA 305 Layer Setting Services (LSS) Implementation.
